description: An agent monitors a remote substation for physical security breaches.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the substation's perimeter intrusion detection system and security cameras.

expected_outcome.value: System is continuously monitoring security feeds.

nodes.task_description: The system detects motion on a camera after hours and flags that the main gate has been breached.

expected_outcome.value: System generates a high-priority security alarm.

nodes.task_description: Immediately notify the company's security operations center and the local police department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends notifications to security and law enforcement.
